rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1115 governs TDHCA's regional housing fund allocation formula. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and has no bearing on housing fund allocation factors or requirements.
quote: provides for allocations that are consistent with applicable federal and state requirements and limitations
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified; the cited rule addresses housing fund distribution, not property tax exemptions.
